_comment_setup: Copy this file to .claude/settings.json in the generated business repo root.
PREREQUISITES: jq must be on PATH (brew install jq / apt install jq). Without jq the
file_path extraction in Bash hooks silently exits 0 — no validator fires.
SKILL_ROOT: Set the SKILL_ROOT env var to the absolute path of the installed
or the symlinked path on this machine). If SKILL_ROOT is unset the hooks fall back to '.'
which works only when the business repo IS the skill root (local dev). In all other cases
the validator scripts will not be found and hooks will fail silently.
BLOCKING vs ADVISORY: hooks that affect lane-coverage and store-screenshots at 'done' are
BLOCKING (no || true) — a real failure surfaces as a hook error. All other validators are
ADVISORY (|| true) — they print warnings but do not interrupt the agent turn.
PRODUCER != VERIFIER: After final PNGs are written a separate PostToolUse step prints a
mandatory instruction to run the SEPARATE grader pass before marking store_console done.
The grader MUST be a different agent/pass than the one that produced the PNGs.

PostToolUse._comment: Write/Edit hook: fires depth-check validators automatically after every relevant artifact write.

hooks.command: f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *SCREENSHOTS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; *PROJECT_STATE.yaml*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:lane-coverage -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; *ANALYTICS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:attribution -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *REVENUE_OPS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:revenue -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *EMAIL_OPS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:email -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *SPEC.md*|*APP_STORE_LISTING.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:aso-metadata -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *SECRETS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:secrets -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *TOOL_DECISIONS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:paid-tool-decisions -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *LOCALIZATION_MARKET_RESEARCH.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:localization-research -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *screenshot-rubric-scores.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *revenuecat-proof.json*|*posthog-proof.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:provider-proof -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; esac

PostToolUse._comment: Bash hook: catches proof artifacts written via touch/echo/tee/bash redirection — complements the Write|Edit hook above.

hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$cmd" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$cmd" in *revenuecat-proof.json*|*posthog-proof.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:provider-proof -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *screenshot-rubric-scores.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *PROJECT_STATE.yaml*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:lane-coverage -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; esac

PostToolUse._comment: Final PNG hook: after any final screenshot PNG is written, mandate the SEPARATE grader pass (producer != verifier). This fires as an advisory instruction — it does NOT block the write, but the grader pass is required before store_console can be marked done.

hooks.command: f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *screenshots/final/*.png) echo ''; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'PRODUCER != VERIFIER — MANDATORY GRADER PASS REQUIRED'; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'Final PNG written. Before marking store_console done you MUST run'; echo 'the screenshot rubric grader as a SEPARATE agent or session pass,'; echo 'NOT the same agent that built/wrote these PNGs.'; echo ''; echo 'Grader pass instructions:'; echo '  1. Open a NEW Claude session (or spawn a fresh subagent).'; echo '  2. Provide: final PNGs, APP_STORE_LISTING.md, EMOTIONAL_DESIGN.md,'; echo '     state/theme.tokens.json, REVENUE_OPS.md, SCREENSHOT_RUBRIC.md.'; echo '  3. Score each slot per SCREENSHOT_RUBRIC.md dimensions 1-8.'; echo '  4. Write scores + builder/grader identity to screenshot-rubric-scores.json.'; echo '  5. The grader field MUST differ from the builder field.'; echo '  6. Each slot MUST include non-empty grader_notes.'; echo '=========================================================='; echo '' ;; esac
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for final PNG grader requirement...
